title: Second Nature Christmas Pop Up XPOP040A Owls Christmas Pop Up Card
features: This unique elasticated 3D Christmas card automatically jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
Includes a blank panel and a gift tag for a personal message
Sold in a unique wallet with a mailing envelope included
description: This unique elasticated 3D Christmas card automatically jumps to life when removed from it's envelope! At Christmas time, you really want to show someone they are special and with your added personal message, it is not just a Christmas card it is a wonderful personal gift to treasure. However the Pop Up can be used for so much more, why not use it as part of a table arrangement, a floral arrangement, or even a Christmas tree decoration? Let your imagination run wild. This amazing card was designed in the UK and uses over 50 folds and cuts and small hand added elements to create a beautiful design. It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop-Up to instantly open when removed from its envelope. The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side and once closed you are able to write your message and place it in it's envelope for posting. We hope you enjoy sending it as much as we enjoyed making it! A Christmas Pop Up with an Owls design and Merry Christmas lettering
